data.scene: User enables wake word detection; the app continuously listens for the wake word in the background.
data.purpose: Enable hands-free voice activation for quick access to the voice assistant.
data.source: Device microphone (continuous audio stream processed by local TFLite model)
data.item: Microphone audio stream (continuously collected for on-device detection)
data.frequency: Continuous (audio chunks ~10ms each buffered and processed locally)
data.storage: Not stored; audio is discarded immediately after local model processing
data.thirdparty: No third-party involvement; all audio processing uses on-device TFLite model
data.switchpath: Settings -> Assist -> Wake Word Detection -> Enable/Disable

permissions.name: RECORD_AUDIO
permissions.purpose: Continuously monitor the microphone for wake word detection
permissions.impact: If denied, wake word detection cannot be enabled
